meta.note: 0=No Formal Education; 1=Certificate 1; 2=Certificate 2; 3=Certificate 3/O'Level; 4=Certificate 4/A'Level; 5=Diploma; 6=Advanced Diploma/Associate Degree/Professional Certificate; 7=Bachelor's Degree/Honours/Professional Diploma; 8=Graduate/Post-Graduate Certificate/Diploma; 9=Master's/Advanced Professional; 10=Doctoral/Higher Professional

choices.text: Advanced Diploma / Associate Degree / Professional Certificate
Bachelor's Honours Degree / Bachelor's Degree / Professional Diploma / Professional Certificate
Graduate Certificate / Post Graduate Certificate / Graduate Diploma / Post Graduate Diploma
Master's Degree / Advanced Professional Diploma / Advanced Professional Certificate
Doctoral Degree / Higher Professional Diploma / Higher Professional Certificate

meta.note: 0=No exposure; 1=Volunteer/Internship; 2=Short-term/Project (<6 months); 3=Part-time/Seasonal/Temporary; 4=Sustained work (1-2 years); 5=Continuous/varied roles 2+ years

options.formula:
COALESCE({{communication_skills_score}}, 0) / 5 * 6 +
COALESCE({{technical_skills_score}}, 0) / 5 * 6 +
COALESCE({{cognitive_functioning_score}}, 0) / 5 * 7 +
COALESCE({{mobility_score}}, 0) / 5 * 6 +
COALESCE({{dexterity_score}}, 0) / 5 * 6 +
COALESCE({{strength_score}}, 0) / 5 * 7 +
COALESCE({{independence_score}}, 0) / 5 * 7
IF({{total_score}} > 70, "Highly Work Ready", IF({{total_score}} >= 50, "Work-Ready / Supported", IF({{total_score}} >= 35, "Partially Ready", "Needs Development")))
